sponsorship_note: No explicit no-sponsor clause. E-Verify only (standard). Unknown sponsorship history — treat as unknown sponsor.
jd_summary: L&D Specialist at Talkiatry (largest US psychiatry practice, 750+ psychiatrists, 2M+ visits). Entry-level. Key duties: facilitate new clinician orientation (MDs, NPs, therapists), create facilitator-led + eLearning content, implement leadership/diversity cohort programs, cross-dept collaboration. Requires 2yr adult-learning delivery, LMS experience, instructional design software, MS Office/virtual tools. Comp $70-75K.
notes: Good L&D fit — Jamie's 3yr covers 2yr ask. LMS (Canvas/Moodle) in her skills. Instructional design software is borderline (she has Canva/Adobe InDesign but not Articulate/Storyline — do NOT fabricate). Healthcare sector is new but intellectual curiosity + adult learning principles are strong. Remote US.
